response.justification: The candidate demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with 9+ years in software development, including roles as a Senior and Staff Software Engineer. Their expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js aligns well with the primary stack, while additional skills in Java/Kotlin and cloud platforms (AWS) meet secondary requirements. Strong contributions to scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests/sec) and AI-agent infrastructure showcase technical depth. However, their experience with Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, and their recent role (re:cinq, 2025) lacks detailed project specifics.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple high-traffic applications
Proven experience with cloud platforms (AWS) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) in production environments
Strong background in AI-agent development and performance optimization for low-latency systems
concerns: No explicit mention of Vitest experience, though testing framework expertise (Jest) is demonstrated
Recent role (re:cinq, 2025) lacks detailed project descriptions to fully assess current relevance
Limited visibility into collaboration with product/design teams, a core responsibility for this role

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and cloud platform expertise
